feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I tap out. I gave it 50 hours and reached mid September, but this is the most mu…
entry.content: I tap out. I gave it 50 hours and reached mid September, but this is the most mundane, boring, repetitive piece of shit I've ever played

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Dark Side of Comedy - Norm Macdonald
entry.content: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x 8qru6m The episode explores how Norm's fearless approach to comedy often masked deeper struggles beneath the surface, most notably a serious gambling addiction that many fans were unaware of. It also sheds light on a mysterious secret that he carried with him until his death, one that remains untold even after his passing. That secret, of course, was his decade long private battle with cancer, which he kept hidden from nearly everyone, including close friends.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
entry.content: Why did this movie flop? It had a $150 million budget and only made $208 million at the box office. Add in all the extra costs and this movie probably lost a lot of money. Why? The critics and the audience rated it highly on RottenTomatoes - 91% from the critics and 92% from the audience scores. 7.2 on imdb is not great, but it's not among the worst either. So what went wrong? I did not like this movie. The writing was an abject failure almost from the start. The group were trying to steal a pri

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Black Magic Woman
entry.content: ESL student here. When Fleetwood Mac wrote Black Magican Woman, it is about a Black woman who does magic (vodoo, like a witch)? Or is it about a Black woman so pretty she looks magic? Or is it even a about a black woman at all, but again a woman that perform rituals in this case called black magic? Is it even about a woman at all?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Hypothetical Question
entry.content: Lets say i got couple of bitcoins on my coinbase wallet and i want them to be transferred to another wallet without any tracking from the government happening. How can i possibly do that? Also what is the best way to keep my laptop device completely anonymous other than using VPN. Is there any device that i can connect to my router and then connect my laptop to the device so i can hide my activity? I want to completely be anonymous and hide any trace of my activity.

entry.title: /news/ News: BBC lines up to probe Trump, orange retard howling and demanding probling end
entry.content: https://lawandcrime.com/high-profil e/trump-lawyers-realize-discovery-i n-presidents-own-lawsuit-could-expo se-him-to-a-jan-6-trial-after-all/ On the same morning that opposing counsel complained in another Florida courtroom about Donald Trump's approach to discovery in a defamation lawsuit he filed, the president's lawyers are slamming the British Broadcasting Corporation's defense for "excessive and impermissibly broad" attempts to put the "events" of Jan. 6 on trial. The response from attorne

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8396 One-Off Edition Previous Thread: >>83629384 F-list …
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8396 One-Off Edition Previous Thread: >>83629384 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Fear is going to be a player in your life. But you get to decide how much. You c…
entry.content: Fear is going to be a player in your life. But you get to decide how much. You can spend your whole life imagining ghosts, worrying about the pathway to the future, but all there will ever be is what's happening here. And the decisions we make in this moment, which are based in either love or fear. So many of us choose our path out of fear disguised as practicality. What we really want seems impossibly out of reach and ridiculous to expect. So, we never dare to ask the universe for it. My father

entry.content: post em

entry.title: /news/ News: Don't mess with Texas. Antifa cell goes to jail for trying to kill cops.
entry.content: https://www.fox4news.com/news/feder al-judges-sentence-eight-north-texa s-antifa-operatives-texas-ice-facil ity-ambush FORT WORTH, Texas - Federal judges on Tuesday handed down massive prison terms totaling nearly five centuries to eight members of a North Texas Antifa cell, including a 100-year sentence for the group's leader, following a historic domestic terrorism trial tied to a violent ambush at an immigration detention center. U.S. District Judge Mark T. Pittman and Chief U.S. District Jud

entry.title: /int/ International: Went to Las Vegas last month
entry.content: Holy shit that place is a shithole. You cannot get around anywhere without walking under that India tier dessert heat for hours, everything is expensive as shit, plus some parts of the streets smelled like marijuana and literal burning shit. How do people still go there? (met a tourist who was a bong). Millennials were lucky to visit it back then.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Q: You're a big admirer of Sonic Youth but you had a really bad relationship wit…
entry.content: Q: You're a big admirer of Sonic Youth but you had a really bad relationship with them at one time. Can you explain? A: On the Kill Yr Idols EP released on Zensor, the title track was a song calling for my death. Q: And you didn't find that funny? A: No, not at all. I hated it. Because the song was calling for my death. And, y'know, there's a lot of unhinged people out there. At Carola's urging, I put it on my top 30 singles of 1983 list, cleverly retitled "I Killed Christgau With My Big Fucking

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >not opening the movie with real footage >not showing any UFOs at all besides TV…
entry.content: >not opening the movie with real footage >not showing any UFOs at all besides TV screen slop >starts with a WWE match This movie made me realize Spielberg is now a boomer. The story was fine but he should have given this movie to someone who would actually show things like Spielberg used to. How does he go from War of the Worlds to this?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: This is a public service announcement
entry.content: There is a lot of negativity right now in here when it comes to steam coming from all the usual suspects but i want to remind you all that all these years he never faltered when it mattered most to us.So if we fail him now what does this say about us? I want you to show right now how much you love Gabe! I want you to show as your tithe! I want you to open up your hearts! And open up your steam accounts! And open up your steam wallets! And buy buy buy in this most glorious sale! Buy at -50%. And

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What does /g/ think of the new CVVDP quality metric? It's a very advanced percep…
entry.content: What does /g/ think of the new CVVDP quality metric? It's a very advanced perceptual metric (ie correlates better with human opinion) that replaces the entire SSIM family (ie SSIMULACRA2, FSIM, MS-SSIM,), VMAF, PSNR, et cetera. >be codec engineer >compare two images >SSIM checks whether local image structures match >catches a lot of obvious mistakes >then visual artifact appears in a place humans barely notice >SSIM score tanks >ask CVVDP instead >it takes into account: >contrast sensitivity, ma

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The industry is OBLIGATED to support my x86 software if they want personal compu…
entry.content: The industry is OBLIGATED to support my x86 software if they want personal computing to move to strictly ARM-based platforms. I demand elegant and seamless translation layers for all the shit that was written for the "outgoing" processor architecture.

entry.content: >I’m pleased to announce the first preview release of xfwl4, Xfce’s Wayland compositor. >After close to six months of work, I feel like it’s ready to get some wider use, even though of course there will be bugs and missing features. Think of this as an alpha release. >https://www.spurint.org/journal/20 26/06/xfwl4s-first-preview-release >https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/xfwl4 Xuds BTFO

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /trash/ General Drawthread
entry.content: Pop Up Pussy Edition General rules: • No one reads or cares about this shit anyway. • Don't be a dick to others; mind your own business, and don't cause tension over requests/art you don't like. • Provide descriptions, links, and image references in a single post as much as possible. • Don't spam or bump your requests. • Check the dropbox or booru to see if your request was done. • AI deliveries are NOT allowed • Ignore shitposters and attention whores at all times. Just report and move on. • Wh

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Toyota Corolla GR
entry.content: >button marked track >take car to track >engine explodes due to inadequate cooling >sorry gaijin, pay for it yourself, racing is not allowed! What's wrong with it? Boost pressure too high? Intercooler inadequately designed? Car and Driver said they ditched the fog lights for additional air intakes but it still overheated after 6 laps at the track. Also, the interior is horrendous and they do nothing to improve it. I know a new generation is coming, but it won't be much better, just a bigger scre

entry.title: /o/ Auto: You may not like it, but this is what automotive perfection looks like. It's a b…
entry.content: You may not like it, but this is what automotive perfection looks like. It's a blank canvas for the artist. A love letter to the driving enthusiast. A machine built not to impress shareholders, but to reward the true gearheads. It's the empty front row at a concert, reserved for those who have been a fan since day 1. Its a drift car, a drag car, a time attack car, a daily commuter, a touge beast, a winter beater. It can be anything. Is it the best at any one thing? No. But that's the beauty of i
